parsed.explanation: I fixed structural/tag issues while preserving the original historical wording and mojibake characters. Fixes made: (1) escaped raw '&' in title text ('Francois & Latin' -> '&'), (2) escaped raw '&' in 'Erudition & de Critique', (3) escaped raw '&' in 'Historique & Critique', (4) escaped raw '&' in 'dien & de conserver', (5) normalized first price tag from <PRIZE> to <PRICE>, (6) normalized second price tag from <PRIZE> to <PRICE>, (7) normalized Bayle entry price tag from <PRIZE> to <PRICE>, and (8) corrected the last bibliography closing tag mismatch (<PRIZE>...</PRICE> -> <PRICE>...</PRICE>).
